recommendations.title: Ciao, Professore!
recommendations.overview: A bureaucratic snafu sends Marco Tullio Sperelli, a portly, middle-aged northern Italian, to teach third grade in a poor town outside Naples

recommendations.title: Love and Anarchy
recommendations.overview: Set in Fascist Italy before the outbreak of World War II, the story centers on Tunin, a farmer turned anarchist who stays in a brothel while preparing to kill Benito Mussolini.

recommendations.title: The Seduction of Mimi
recommendations.overview: Voting against the Mafia in what he thinks is a secret ballot costs Sicilian laborer Mimi his livelihood. He leaves his wife, flees to Turin and romances a Communist organizer – but he just can’t shake the Mafia. When they lure Mimi back to Sicily wi

recommendations.title: Seven Beauties
recommendations.overview: Pasqualino Frafuso, known in Naples as "Pasqualino Seven Beauties" is a petty thief who lives off of the profits of his seven sisters while claiming to protect their honor at any cost, Pasqualino is arrested for murder and later sent to fight in the

recommendations.title: Swept Away
recommendations.overview: Stranded and alone on a desert island during a cruise, a spoiled rich woman and a deckhand fall in love and make a date to reunite after their rescue.

recommendations.title: Triangle of Sadness
recommendations.overview: A celebrity model couple are invited on a luxury cruise for the uber-rich, helmed by an unhinged, alcoholic captain. What first appears Instagrammable ends catastrophically, leaving the survivors stranded on a desert island in a struggle of hierarchy

recommendations.title: Now, Voyager
recommendations.overview: A woman suffers a nervous breakdown and an oppressive mother before being freed by the love of a man she meets on a cruise.

recommendations.title: One, Two, Three
recommendations.overview: In Cold War-era West Berlin, American Coca-Cola executive C.R. 'Mac' MacNamara is tasked with playing babysitter to his boss' spoiled 17-year-old daughter Scarlett, who proves more difficult than anticipated when she reveals that she is pregnant by a

recommendations.title: Overboard
recommendations.overview: A spoiled, wealthy yacht owner is thrown overboard and becomes the target of revenge from his mistreated employee.

recommendations.title: Bitter Moon
recommendations.overview: A passenger on a cruise ship develops an irresistible infatuation with an eccentric paraplegic's wife.
